diagrams.title: Classification of Relations
diagrams.description: Shows how relations are classified based on properties they satisfy
diagrams.purpose: Understand classification hierarchy and remember which properties combine to form special relation types

diagrams.title: Properties of Relations on Set A
diagrams.description: Visual representation of each property with directed graph
elements: Symmetric: Double arrows or two-way edges
Transitive: Direct path implies indirect path exists
diagrams.purpose: Visualize relations as directed graphs to understand abstract properties intuitively

diagrams.title: Equivalence Relation Partition
diagrams.description: Shows how equivalence relation partitions set into disjoint equivalence classes
elements: Set A divided into equivalence classes
Elements within class all related to each other
diagrams.purpose: Understand equivalence relations create partitions of the underlying set

diagrams.title: Hasse Diagram for Partial Order
diagrams.description: Simplified representation of poset showing only covering relations
diagrams.purpose: Learn to draw and interpret Hasse diagrams for partial orders
